author: SharpMUSH
name: SharpMUSH C# DLL plugin
description: A starter SharpMUSH compiled C# plugin (net10.0, EnableDynamicLoading): [SharpPlugin] : PluginBase with a sample command + function, a kind:managed package.yaml, and a deterministic build/SHA-256/release CI.

PluginNamespace.description: Root namespace for the plugin's C# (set this to match the assembly name -n you pass, e.g. MyPlugin).

PluginId.description: The plugin id slug (lowercase, digits, hyphens). Also the plugins/<id>/ directory, the package id, and the release-tag prefix.

PluginCmd.description: The sample command name (without the leading +). Uppercase, no spaces or hyphens, e.g. MYPLUGIN.

PluginFn.description: The sample function name. Lowercase, no spaces or hyphens, e.g. myplugin_add.

Author.description: Author, written into package.yaml and LICENSE.

Owner.description: GitHub owner/org for the homepage URL.
